design_philosophy.core_loop: Select play from simplified offensive playbook, execute passing-focused drive, score touchdowns, defend against opponent
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Arcade-style risk/reward between deep passes and ground game in simplified 13-play system
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Lead Joe Montana and simplified teams through football games with accessible, fast-paced offensive action
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Intentionally arcade-focused design prioritizing passing and accessibility over simulation depth; deliberately simplified compared to competing Madden series (113 plays reduced to 13, 3D field removed). Designed as a faster, more accessible alternative to realistic football simulation.

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Players can toggle penalties on/off; can select number of players per team to adjust game parameters

progression.unlock_mechanism: Select from 16 teams; access multiple game modes (normal game, two-minute drill, Sega Bowl mode)
replayability_hooks: Two-minute drill mode for time-pressured scenarios

world_building_techniques: Joe Montana celebrity licensing and likenesses
Team-based identity through unnamed team selection

faction_indicators: 16 distinct teams with different rosters (though unlicensed, providing team identity)
Home/away team dynamics in competitive multiplayer
environmental_storytelling: Football field layout and stadium presentation (simplified 2D presentation)

sources_used: Wikipedia - Joe Montana Football (gameplay, development, and legacy sections)
